name: HNS_PERSONS
description: HNS PERSONS. This table stores Owner / Person related data. The column Type signifies type of activity (Incident, Investigation or Action).

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.Comments: EMPLOYEE_ID column : Employee ID of the owner.

columns.Name: PERSON_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON_ASSIGN_ID column : Assignment ID of the owner.

columns.Name: ROLE_CODE
columns.Comments: Role ID assigned to the person.

columns.Name: TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Target completion date for the task assigned to the person.

columns.Name: ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual completion date of the task  assigned to the person.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Completed flag. Signifies whether the task is completed

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag. Signifies whether the task assigned is deleted

columns.Name: TASK_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Task Type identifier. Lookup to the Task Type FND lookup.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Unique person identifier. This is the system generated primary key for HNS_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RESULT_CODE
columns.Comments: Result Code Column : Incident Owner check result code.

columns.Name: ACTION_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Action Required Flag Column : Check box to confirm whether an action is required.
